    Constructors in global.thalion.ttio.genomics with parameters of type Enums.AcquisitionMode
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (pre-M86) that defaults WrittenGenomicRun.signalCodecOverrides to empty.
     
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (M86 era, 19 components) that defaults WrittenGenomicRun.provenanceRecords to empty.
     
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords)
    Backwards-compatible constructor (Phase 1 / post-M91, 20 components) that defaults the M93 reference-related fields to their natural "no reference embedded" values.
     
    WrittenGenomicRun(Enums.AcquisitionMode acquisitionMode, String referenceUri, String platform, String sampleName, long[] positions, byte[] mappingQualities, int[] flags, byte[] sequences, byte[] qualities, long[] offsets, int[] lengths, List<String> cigars, List<String> readNames, List<String> mateChromosomes, long[] matePositions, int[] templateLengths, List<String> chromosomes, Enums.Compression signalCompression, Map<String,Enums.Compression> signalCodecOverrides, List<ProvenanceRecord> provenanceRecords, boolean embedReference, Map<String,byte[]> referenceChromSeqs, Path externalReferencePath)
    Creates an instance of a WrittenGenomicRun record class.
